title: Tirucalia plagiantha
taxonomy: Tirucalia plagiantha is classified within the family Apocynaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This family is part of the order Gentianales, which also includes other plant families such as the gentian and loganiaceae families. The order Gentianales is part of the larger clade of asterids in the angiosperm classification. The family Apocynaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Plumerioideae, which Tirucalia plagiantha belongs to. Tirucalia plagiantha's classification within the Plumerioideae subfamily is specific to its unique characteristics and relationships with other plants in this group.
